candidates.why: This is the only operating D&A row clearly related to production/COGS. However, it appears as a breakdown component within the cost-of-sales section, while the selected parent bucket is the total row 'Cost of sales', so adding it separately would likely double count.
Operating D&A row, but it belongs to selling/marketing rather than COGS, so it is not relevant to the selected COGS bucket.
Operating D&A row, but its placement indicates it relates to administration expenses rather than COGS.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is the total row 'Cost of sales'. 'Depreciation of production' appears to be a sub-component inside that bucket, not a separate same-level expense to add later.

candidates.why: This is an SG&A-related D&A row, but it appears as a component breakdown under the already selected parent row 'Selling and marketing expenses', so adding it separately would likely double count.
This appears to be the administration-related D&A component under the already selected parent row 'Administration expenses', so it should not be added separately.
This D&A row belongs to production/COGS, not SG&A.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket already includes the parent rows 'Selling and marketing expenses' and 'Administration expenses'. The visible D&A rows appear to be nested components of those selected totals. No separate R&D amortization row is shown.
